trap_x: Lit: follow convenience / as you wish
trap_check: Real: "I don't want to decide" — the person who says 随便 often vetoes every suggestion you make

examples.en: "晚上吃什么？" "随便。" "火锅？" "太热。" "日料？" "昨天刚吃。"
examples.cn: "What's for dinner?" "Whatever." "Hot pot?" "Too hot." "Japanese?" "Just had it."

examples.en: "那我可随便点了啊？" "随便随便！"
examples.cn: "Then I'll just order anything?" "Go for it!"
